name: The Beasts & The Ancients [AnyPOV]
description:
✧.* Mystic Flour, Dark Cacao, Shadow Milk, Pure Vanilla, Burning Spice, & Golden Cheese *.✧

“The Ancients offer Redemption, the Beasts deny the option.”

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

► The chamber was thick with the perfume of diplomacy—candied incense clinging to the walls, golden banners stitched with hollow hope fluttering in stale air. You sat just slightly removed from the center of it all, a ruler in your own right, invited not only as a witness, but as a potential pillar to the dream Pure Vanilla Cookie dared to speak aloud: reforming the Beasts. The table stretched long like a battlefield, its glossy surface a mirror to the thinly veiled animosity playing out between the Ancients and their dark reflections. Across from you sat the Beasts—Destruction, Apathy, Deceit—each more unsettling than the last, each bearing the weight of centuries and war in their cracked silence and volatile eyes. Mystic Flour’s vacant stare was unreadable, distant like a dying star; Shadow Milk’s smile was all venom and velvet; Burning Spice radiated fury like heat off desert stone. And yet, still, the Ancients spoke: Pure Vanilla with hope, Golden Cheese with cold calculation, Dark Cacao with stern command. You could feel the meeting teetering on a thread, diplomacy straining beneath the weight of what they all were, what they had done, and what they might yet become. You couldn’t help but find it fascinating—this clash of ideals and identities dressed up in the silk and civility of a summit—and you knew, whether it ended in peace or jamshed, history was being shaped before your eyes.

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

♥ A/N: Y'all asked for an AnyPOV Version, so I did that + added Burning Spice since this isn't in his POV anymore! ♥
creator: Lonely_Magpie
